hypothesis: A reflow-first landing layout with a single primary hero CTA, main-column synthesis blocks, compact month-tile archive heat-map, and a promo-only sidebar increases clicks on today's brief and weekly/monthly rollups without reducing subscribe or cross-edition engagement.
change_summary: Refactor homepage (index) under SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2=1: primary "Read today's brief" CTA, secondary hero actions, main column (How it works / About, month-grid Daily Archive, Weekly, Monthly), promo-only sidebar, and WCAG AA footer contrast.
notes: Queued behind EXP-20260628-web-enrich-skills — do not start baseline until prior experiment completes treatment window (ends 2026-07-26) and verdict is recorded. Next in queue after this completes: EXP-20260715-soft-dedup-diversity-skills (RANK-2; baseline planned 2026-08-24). Linked capture: EPH-20260701-LAND. Build flag: SITE_LANDING_LAYOUT_V2=1 (default off until treatment ~2026-08-10). Layout: main-column reflow (How it works, month-tile archive heat-map, weekly/monthly) + promo-only sidebar. PostHog event: homepage_index_click with props { edition, cta, target_path } where cta is today_brief|rollup|subscribe|cross_edition|weekly|monthly|archive_date. Import snapshots via npm run experiment -- snapshot EXP-20260701-landing-layout --csv path/to/posthog-export.csv after each window; rebuild with npm run build:pages.
